messages.rawText:
Thanks for asking! Price differences on our site can happen for a few reasons:

**Product Variations:**
- Different pack sizes (60, 100, or 120 tea bags) are priced accordingly
- Unique blends with premium ingredients cost more

**Payment Method Discounts:**
- **Prepaid orders get an extra 5% discount** 💙
- COD orders have a ₹30 shipping fee

**Active Promotions:**
- Use code **TEALOVER30** for ₹30 off
- Spend ₹1299+ and get a **FREE gift**

**Shipping:**
- Free shipping on prepaid orders over ₹399
- COD adds ₹30 to your total

If you're comparing specific products and the pricing still seems unclear, feel free to share the product names, and I can help clarify further. You can also reach out to **contact@bluetea.co.in** for detailed pricing questions.

The [**Flower Herbal Tea - Pack Of 8**](https://bluetea.co.in/products/flower-tea-pack-of-8) is perfect for your wellness goals! Here's what each flower does:

**Weight & Fitness:** Butterfly Pea supports metabolic function and fitness goals.

**Glowing Skin & Anti-Aging:** Hibiscus promotes radiant, glowing skin while Rose boosts immunity and natural glow.

**Detox & Wellness:** Jasmine aids detoxification, Marigold supports digestion, and Amaranth treats digestive issues—all essential for natural weight management and skin clarity.

**Bonus Benefits:** Chamomile improves sleep (crucial for metabolism), Lavender releases stress (reduces cortisol-related weight gain).

**Price:** ₹1,349 (was ₹1,999) — 32% off!

**Consumption Tips:** Enjoy 2-3 cups daily with balanced meals, light dinners, and stay hydrated. Pair with consistent sleep and lighter eating for best results.

This combo addresses all four goals naturally—no exercise needed, just consistent sipping! 🌸

messages.cleanText: The [**Flower Herbal Tea - Pack Of 8**](https://bluetea.co.in/products/flower-tea-pack-of-8) is perfect for your wellness goals! Here's what each flower does: **Weight & Fitness:** Butterfly Pea supports metabolic function and fitness goals. **Glowing Skin & Anti-Aging:** Hibiscus promotes radiant, glowing skin while Rose boosts immunity and natural glow. **Detox & Wellness:** Jasmine aids detoxification, Marigold supports digestion, and Amaranth treats digestive issues—all essential for natural weight management and skin clarity. **Bonus Benefits:** Chamomile improves sleep (crucial for metabolism), Lavender releases stress (reduces cortisol-related weight gain). **Price:** ₹1,349 (was ₹1,999) — 32% off! **Consumption Tips:** Enjoy 2-3 cups daily with balanced meals, light dinners, and stay hydrated. Pair with consistent sleep and lighter eating for best results. This combo addresses all four goals naturally—no exercise needed, just consistent sipping! 🌸

[**Belly Fat Herbal Tea - 90 Tea Bags**](https://bluetea.co.in/products/copy-of-belly-fat-herbal-tea-30-tea-bags-pack-of-3) is specifically formulated to target **belly fat and bloating** through its blend of Butterfly Pea, Lemongrass, Ginger, and Spearmint.

While this herbal infusion **boosts metabolism** and **promotes weight loss**, it's designed with a focus on abdominal fat reduction and digestive support rather than whole-body fat loss.

For broader metabolic support, you might explore our other blends. However, when paired with a **balanced diet and active lifestyle**, the metabolism-boosting properties can support overall wellness.

**Consumption tips:** Drink **3 cups daily** with balanced meals and limit junk food and sweets for best results.

Would you like to explore other herbal infusions that support overall metabolic health?

यह **Butterfly Pea, Lemongrass, Ginger और Spearmint** से बना है—सब कुछ प्राकृतिक!

messages.rawText:
For **weight loss and anxiety relief**, the current product [**Skin Glow Herbal Tea**](https://bluetea.co.in/products/skin-glow-herbal-infusion-50-tea-bags) isn't the best match, though it does contain **Ashwagandha**—known for calming anxiety.

For your specific needs, I'd recommend:

**Weight Loss:**
- [**Keto Herbal Infusion - 30 Tea Bags**](https://bluetea.co.in/products/keto-herbal-weight-loss-tea-30-bags) – Designed specifically for weight management

**Anxiety & Stress Relief:**
- [**Calm/Sleep Herbal Infusion**](https://bluetea.co.in/products/) – Contains calming botanicals like lavender and chamomile

**Dual Benefits:**
- [**Detox Herbal Infusion - 30 Tea Bags**](https://bluetea.co.in/products/) – Supports natural detox while promoting relaxation

The **Keto blend** pairs well with a low-carb diet, while **Calm** is best enjoyed in the evening. For anxiety, consistent consumption (2-3 cups daily) works best alongside balanced meals and stress management.

Which appeals to you more—weight management focus or anxiety relief?

messages.rawText:
**Diet Plan for [**Belly Fat Monthly Pack - 120 Tea Bags**](https://bluetea.co.in/products/belly-fat-monthly-pack-120-tea-bags):**

**Daily Routine:**
- **Morning:** 1 cup with a light breakfast (oats, fruits, eggs)
- **Afternoon:** 1 cup after lunch with protein & veggies
- **Evening:** 1 cup after dinner with lighter meals

**Foods to Include:**
- Lean proteins (chicken, fish, tofu)
- Whole grains & fiber-rich foods
- Fresh vegetables & fruits
- Healthy fats (nuts, olive oil)
- Plenty of water

**Foods to Avoid:**
- Junk food & processed snacks
- Sugary drinks & desserts
- Fried & oily foods
- Refined flour products
- Alcohol

**Lifestyle:**
- Drink 3 cups daily consistently
- Exercise 30 mins daily
- Sleep 7-8 hours
- Stay hydrated

This herbal infusion boosts metabolism and reduces cravings when paired with balanced eating. Consistency is key! 🌿

**Kaise Lein:**
- Ek cup garam pani mein ek teabag daalen
- 3-5 minit tak steep kariye
- Teabag nikaal kariye aur enjoy kariye

**Consumption Tips:**
- **Din mein 3 cups** lein—subah detox ke liye, workout se pehle, ya raat ko
- Ise **bina cheeni** ke lein balanced meals ke saath
- **Lemon add kariye** color-changing effect aur extra antioxidants ke liye! 🍋

**Fayde:**
- Metabolism boost karta hai
- Natural detox & cleanse
- Caffeine-free, keto-friendly
- Weight management mein madad karta hai

Yeh ₹1,399 mein 200 teabags aata hai—bahut value for money!

Bilkul, kariye! [**Butterfly Pea Flower Herbal Tea - 200 Teabags**](https://bluetea.co.in/products/butterfly-pea-flower-tea-200-teabags) ko meal ke saath lene ka tarika:

**Meal Ke Saath Consumption:**
- **Balanced meals ke saath** ise enjoy kariye—breakfast, lunch, ya dinner ke time
- Meal ke **baad ya beech mein** ek cup le sakte hain
- **Bina cheeni** ke piyein taaki metabolism properly kaam kare

**Best Timing:**
- Subah breakfast ke saath—energy boost ke liye
- Lunch ke baad—digestion mein madad
- Dinner se 2-3 ghante pehle—caffeine-free hone se koi problem nahi

**Tips:**
- Light, nutritious meals ke saath pair kariye
- Junk food aur excessive sweets avoid kariye—better results ke liye
- Din mein **3 cups** regular consumption ke liye ideal hai

Yeh herbal infusion aapke fitness goals ko support karta hai jab aap healthy eating maintain karein.

Kya aap isko order karna chahte hain?

Namaste! Blue Tea ke **stick products** ke baare mein poochne ke liye shukriya.

Dukh ke saath, mujhe apke paas jo specific stick product hai uske liye detailed instructions mere knowledge mein nahi hain. Lekin main aapko sahi guidance dene ke liye ek chhota sa sawal poochna chahta hoon:

**Aap kis type ka stick use kar rahe hain?** Kya yeh:
- **Slim Tea Stick** hai?
- **Detox ya Cleanse blend** hai?
- **Koi aur herbal infusion stick** hai?

Ek baar aap batayein, main aapko sahi tarike se use karne ke liye poori jaankari dijiye. Alternatively, aap **contact@bluetea.co.in** par email karke bhi detailed instructions maang sakte hain.

Aapka swasthya hamara priority hai! 🌿

We recommend reviewing your order carefully before placing it to avoid any changes needed later.

- **WhatsApp** with clear details, or
- **Email:** contact@bluetea.co.in

Our team will review your request and respond within 24 hours to see if we can help in exceptional cases.

Do you have your **order ID or registered phone number** handy so we can check your order status?

messages.rawText: Which tea is better slim tea or belly fat tea
messages.cleanText: Which tea is better slim tea or belly fat tea

messages.rawText:
Both are excellent for weight management, but they work slightly differently:

**[**Slim Herbal Tea**](https://bluetea.co.in/products/slim-herbal-tea-60-tea-bags) - ₹789.00** focuses on **boosting metabolism, reducing cravings, and increasing energy**. It's ideal if you want faster fat-burning and are doing intermittent fasting or keto.

**[**Belly Fat Herbal Tea**](https://bluetea.co.in/products/belly-fat-herbal-tea-30-tea-bags-pack-of-9) - ₹2999.00** targets **stubborn belly fat and bloating** specifically, with ingredients like lemongrass and ginger for digestion support. Better if bloating and digestive comfort are your main concerns.

**Key difference:** Slim Tea = overall metabolism boost; Belly Fat Tea = targeted belly reduction + digestive support.

**Consumption tips:** Both work best with **3 cups daily** alongside a balanced diet and active lifestyle.

**Which suits you?** If you want quick energy and overall fat loss, go Slim. If belly bloating bothers you most, choose Belly Fat Tea. Many customers use both for complete results! 🌿
End of stream

messages.rawText: Can thyroid patient drink slim tea
messages.cleanText: Can thyroid patient drink slim tea

messages.rawText:
Thyroid patients should **consult their doctor before consuming** [**Slim Herbal Tea**](https://bluetea.co.in/products/slim-herbal-tea-60-tea-bags).

While our herbal infusion is **100% organic, natural, and caffeine-free with no known side effects**, thyroid conditions require personalized medical guidance. Certain ingredients may interact with thyroid medications or conditions, and only your doctor can assess this safely.

**Next step:** Show this product to your healthcare provider—they'll give you the best recommendation based on your specific thyroid health and current medications.

For any concerns, you can also reach our team at **contact@bluetea.co.in** or **+91-7980528437** for additional product details to share with your doctor. 🌿

messages.rawText:
**Belly Fat herbal infusion ko hot water mein lena chahiye!** 🌡️

Hot water se:
- Ingredients ka **maximum extraction** hota hai
- **Metabolism boost** better hota hai
- **Digestion** improve hota hai
- Flavor bhi zyada acha aata hai

**Tarika:**
1. Ek cup hot water (80-90°C) mein herbal infusion bag daale
2. **3-5 minutes** steep kariye
3. Bag nikale aur enjoy kariye

**Important:** Sugar na daale—without sugar hi consume kariye best results ke liye.

**Consumption:** Din mein **3 baar** piye, balanced diet ke saath. Junk food aur sweets limit kariye.

Cold water se ingredients properly extract nahi hote, isliye hot water recommend karte hain! ☕✨

messages.rawText: What is difference between butterfly pea flower tea nd tummy
messages.cleanText: What is difference between butterfly pea flower tea nd tummy

messages.rawText:
**Butterfly Pea Flower** and **Tummy** herbal infusions serve different wellness purposes:

**[Butterfly Pea Flower Herbal Tea](https://bluetea.co.in/products/butterfly-pea-flower-tea-200-teabags)** focuses on **metabolism boost, detox, and weight loss**. It's caffeine-free, antioxidant-rich, and ideal for fitness support. Enjoy **3 cups daily** as a morning detox or pre-workout booster. The vibrant blue petals turn pink when you add lemon—a fun, color-changing infusion!

**Tummy herbal infusion** targets **digestive wellness and gut health**. It's designed to soothe and support your digestive system with a different blend of ingredients.

**Choose Butterfly Pea if:** You want metabolism support, natural detox, and weight management.

**Choose Tummy if:** You're focused on digestive comfort and gut wellness.

Both are **caffeine-free and keto-friendly**. Your choice depends on whether you prioritize fitness/detox or digestive support. 💙

messages.cleanText: How is the taste

messages.rawText:
This herbal infusion has a **fresh, balanced flavor** from its natural ingredients. The **Lemongrass** brings a citrusy, refreshing note, **Ginger** adds warmth and subtle spice, and **Spearmint** provides a cooling, minty finish. The **Butterfly Pea** contributes a mild, earthy undertone without bitterness.

It's **naturally smooth and pleasant**—best enjoyed **without sugar** to let the ingredients shine. Many customers appreciate the crisp, invigorating taste that pairs well with meals throughout the day.

Since taste is personal, the 1,045 positive reviews (4.76/5 rating) suggest most find it genuinely enjoyable! 🌿

messages.cleanText: This herbal infusion has a **fresh, balanced flavor** from its natural ingredients. The **Lemongrass** brings a citrusy, refreshing note, **Ginger** adds warmth and subtle spice, and **Spearmint** provides a cooling, minty finish. The **Butterfly Pea** contributes a mild, earthy undertone without bitterness. It's **naturally smooth and pleasant**—best enjoyed **without sugar** to let the ingredients shine. Many customers appreciate the crisp, invigorating taste that pairs well with meals throughout the day. Since taste is personal, the 1,045 positive reviews (4.76/5 rating) suggest most find it genuinely enjoyable! 🌿

messages.rawText:
**Consumption tips for Belly Fat Herbal Tea:**

Drink **3 times daily** with a balanced diet for best results:

- **First thing in the morning** on an empty stomach
- **30 minutes after breakfast/lunch** (after 2-3 hour intervals)
- **Before bed**

**Key tips:**
- Limit junk food and sweets
- Maintain a balanced diet alongside consumption
- Stay consistent for optimal results
- Caffeine-free, so it's gentle on your body

This herbal infusion works best when paired with an active lifestyle and healthy eating habits. The natural ingredients—Butterfly Pea, Lemongrass, Ginger, and Spearmint—work synergistically to support your metabolism and reduce bloating over time.

messages.rawText:
Namaste! Blue Tea ke saath order karne ke liye aapko hamare website https://bluetea.co.in par jaana hoga.

**Order karne ke steps:**

1. Website par apne pasand ke **herbal infusion** ko dhundiye
2. Product page par quantity select kariye
3. "Add to Cart" par click kariye
4. Checkout par apni details (phone number, address) bharie
5. **Prepaid** ya **Cash on Delivery (COD)** payment option select kariye
6. Order confirm kariye

**Shipping details:**
- **Prepaid orders** (₹399+ se): Free shipping
- **COD orders**: ₹30 delivery fee
- Delivery: 3-5 days post-dispatch
- Hum 24 hours mein ship karte hain

Agar order confirmation nahi mila, toh apna registered phone number share kariye, aur hum aapko assist karenge.

Kisi aur sawal ke liye contact@bluetea.co.in par likhi dijiye! 💙
End of stream

Visible reduction in fine lines, improved skin texture, and enhanced firmness typically become noticeable after 4–6 weeks of consistent use, as Ayurvedic herbs gradually rejuvenate and nourish your skin. For best results, apply daily as directed and embrace this mindful ritual as part of your self-care journey.

messages.cleanText: Can this be used in a daily routine? mouth-pulling-oil

Yes, [**Mouth Oil for Oil Pulling with Coconut & Mint for Oral care and Bad Breath (9 herbs)**](https://www.bluenectar.co.in/products/mouth-pulling-oil) is designed for daily use as part of your oral care routine. Practicing oil pulling each morning—swishing the oil in your mouth for 10-15 minutes—can help maintain oral hygiene, freshen breath, and support overall wellness. The blend of coconut, menthol, and Iremedadi oil, along with 9 potent herbs, makes it gentle and effective for everyday use. This ritual is rooted in authentic Ayurvedic tradition and supports natural detoxification for a healthy mouth and radiant skin.

messages.rawText: how to use
messages.cleanText: how to use

messages.rawText:
To use [**Mouth Oil for Oil Pulling with Coconut & Mint for Oral care and Bad Breath (9 herbs)**](https://www.bluenectar.co.in/products/mouth-pulling-oil):

1. Take 1 tablespoon (about 10 ml) of the oil.
2. Swish it gently in your mouth for 10–15 minutes, ensuring it reaches all areas.
3. Do not swallow the oil.
4. Spit it out and rinse your mouth thoroughly with warm water.
5. Brush your teeth as usual.

For best results, practice this daily in the morning before eating or drinking. This authentic Ayurvedic ritual supports oral hygiene, fresher breath, and overall wellness.
End of stream

messages.rawText: How to use live in condition
messages.cleanText: How to use live in condition

To use the [**Batana & Almond Leave-In Conditioner**](https://www.bluenectar.co.in/products/batana-almond-hair-mask), start with freshly washed, towel-dried hair. Take a small amount and apply it evenly to the lengths of your hair, focusing on the ends where dryness and frizz are most common. Gently comb through to detangle and ensure even distribution. Do not rinse out—this allows the Ayurvedic herbs and nourishing oils to keep working, leaving your hair soft, smooth, and manageable throughout the day. Suitable for all hair types, including color-treated hair.

messages.rawText: Is it on wet hair ?
messages.cleanText: Is it on wet hair ?

Yes, the [**Batana & Almond Leave-In Conditioner**](https://www.bluenectar.co.in/products/batana-almond-hair-mask) should be applied to freshly washed, towel-dried (damp) hair. After shampooing, gently squeeze out excess water, then apply a small amount of the conditioner to the lengths and ends. Comb through for even distribution—no need to rinse. This helps lock in moisture, control frizz, and leave your hair soft and manageable with the authentic nourishment of Ayurvedic herbs.

messages.rawText: how to use the massager
messages.cleanText: how to use the massager

Namaste! To use a Blue Nectar massager, gently apply your chosen Ayurvedic oil—such as the Triphaladi Ayurvedic Fat Burning & Slimming Oil—onto the targeted area. Use the massager in circular or sweeping motions to help the oil absorb, stimulate circulation, and enhance the benefits of the herbal ingredients. This ritual supports relaxation, detoxification, and skin toning. For best results, follow the product’s recommended usage frequency and enjoy the authentic Ayurvedic experience. If you need detailed guidance, please reach out to cs@bluenectar.co.in.

messages.rawText: how to use the head massager
messages.cleanText: how to use the head massager

To use a head massager, apply your preferred Ayurvedic hair oil to your scalp. Gently move the massager in circular motions across your scalp, focusing on areas where you want to boost relaxation or improve circulation. This helps the oil absorb better, promotes scalp health, and can support hair growth. Use light pressure for a soothing experience, and enjoy this ritual as part of your regular hair care routine. If you need further assistance, please contact cs@bluenectar.co.in.

They are caused mainly due to stress, lack of sleep, hormonal changes, dietary imbalance, etc. Since the causes are all-natural, dark circles are therefore easy to treat with natural remedies, a good lifestyle and proper sleep. Blue Nectar Kumkumadi Serum is made up of 26 vital herbs including Sandalwood, Saffron, Lodhra, etc. Sandalwood is known for its ability to fight dark circles naturally. After the massage, lie down and keep a cold cucumber slice on each of your eyes for 5 minutes. Doing this regularly for 4-5 weeks will help your skin fight the dark circles in a natural way. messages.cleanText: How long does it take to see results? womens-shata-dhauta-ghrita-face-cream-for-glowing-skin-19-herbs-50g

With the Women's Shata Dhauta Ghrita Face Cream, most users begin to notice improved hydration and a subtle glow within 1–2 weeks of regular use. For visible reduction in fine lines, wrinkles, and enhanced skin firmness, consistent application for at least 4–6 weeks is recommended. This timeframe allows the potent blend of 19 Ayurvedic herbs, 100-times-washed ghee, saffron, and rose to deeply nourish and repair your skin. Results may vary based on individual skin type and routine. For best results, apply daily as part of your morning and evening ritual.

messages.rawText: Can we use this serums in day skin care
messages.cleanText: Can we use this serums in day skin care

Yes, Blue Nectar face serums such as the **Vitamin C Serum** and **Turmeric Face Serum/Oil** can be used in your daytime skincare routine. These serums are formulated with natural Ayurvedic ingredients to brighten and nourish your skin. For best results, apply the serum on cleansed skin and follow with a moisturizer and sunscreen to protect your skin throughout the day. Always patch test before regular use to ensure compatibility with your skin.

messages.rawText:
To use [**Nalpamaradi Thailam - Skin Brightening Oil with Turmeric for Body and Face (16 herbs)**](https://www.bluenectar.co.in/products/nalpamaradi-tailam-skin-brightening-oil-face-body):

1. Apply a generous amount to clean, dry skin on your face and body.
2. Gently massage in circular motions, allowing the oil to absorb for 30 minutes to 1 hour.
3. Rinse off with a mild cleanser or lukewarm water.

For best results, use daily. Due to turmeric, the oil may leave a slight yellow tint—this is natural and washes off easily. Always patch test before first use, especially for sensitive skin.

messages.cleanText: Nalpamaradi Thailam is crafted with 16 Ayurvedic herbs, including turmeric and sesame oil, and is known for brightening and evening out skin tone. While turmeric has natural antibacterial properties that may benefit some acne-prone skin, this oil is quite rich and may feel heavy or potentially clog pores for those with active acne or very oily skin. If your skin is actively breaking out, it’s best to patch test first or consult your dermatologist. For lighter, targeted care, you might also consider [**Turmeric Oil for Glowing Skin and Even Skin Tone (16 herbs, 30ml)**](https://www.bluenectar.co.in/products/turmeric-face-serum-for-glowing-skin-16-herbs-30-ml), which is plant-based and lighter in texture.

- Improve sleep quality

- Reduce stress and anxiety

These benefits work holistically to nurture your mind and body, supporting a balanced sleep cycle. If you’d like more personalized guidance, you can also consult our Ayurvedic doctors on WhatsApp. I’ll share the number in the next message.

Sri Sri Tattva Sandal Soap is crafted to bring you the essence and benefits of sandalwood, but it does not contain pure sandalwood wood or oil as its main ingredient. Instead, it uses **sandal perfume** along with other natural ingredients to provide a relaxing fragrance and skin nourishment. This approach ensures a gentle, holistic cleansing experience without harsh chemicals.

If you’re seeking a product with pure sandalwood oil or extract, you may want to explore our other offerings or consult our Ayurvedic doctors for personalized guidance.

[**Neem Tablet - Complete Skin Care, 60 Tabs | 300 mg**](https://www.srisritattva.com/products/shop-neem-tablet-complete-skin-care) offers holistic benefits rooted in Ayurveda. This makes it a nurturing addition to your daily wellness and skin care routine.

Kanchanara Guggulu is primarily used in Ayurveda for supporting the thyroid, lymphatic system, and managing cysts, nodules, and glandular swellings. messages.cleanText: I have question about product delivery

Our products are shipped across India, except on Sundays and public holidays. Orders are dispatched the next business day and usually arrive within 3 to 4 working days, though remote areas may take longer. Orders below ₹3000 have a ₹90 shipping fee; above ₹3000, delivery is free. If you receive a damaged product, please refuse delivery and contact onlinesupport@srisritattva.com with your Order ID for a replacement. For more details, you may also reach our customer support at 1800 120 8030 (Monday to Saturday, 10am–6pm).

messages.rawText: Worldwide delivery

Currently, Sri Sri Tattva offers shipping and delivery only within India. International or worldwide delivery options are not available at this time. If you need further assistance, please contact onlinesupport@srisritattva.com.

messages.rawText:
To use [**Sunguard, SPF 50 PA +++**](https://www.srisritattva.com/products/sunguard) daily, apply it as the last step in your morning skincare routine. Take a generous amount and spread it evenly over your face and neck. Allow it to dry for 10–15 minutes for a natural finish. Reapply as needed, especially if you’re outdoors for extended periods or after sweating. This herbal, antioxidant-rich formula is suitable for all skin types and offers broad-spectrum protection without any white cast or heavy feel.

I’ve shared the product details above. If you’d like more personalized guidance, you can also consult our Ayurvedic doctors on WhatsApp. I’ll share the number in the next message.

Faqsection: 1. What is Sunguard Sun Protection, and how does it work on the skin? Sunguard is a herbal sunscreen lotion designed for broad-spectrum UV protection. It forms a lightweight shield over the skin to help defend against daily sun exposure. 2. What SPF level does Sunguard Sun Protection offer? It contains SPF 50 PA+++, which is considered high protection against UVA and UVB rays. 3. Is Sunguard Sun Protection suitable for all skin types, including oily or sensitive? The formula is non-comedogenic, fragrance-free, and lightweight, making it suitable for oily, dry, and sensitive skin. 4. How often should I reapply Sunguard Sun Protection during the day? Reapplication may depend on your outdoor exposure. It is generally advised to reapply every 2-3 hours outdoors or as needed. 5. Can Sunguard Sun Protection be used under makeup? Yes, it can be used as the final step in your morning routine. Once dried, it sits well under makeup. 6. Does Sunguard Sun Protection provide UVA and UVB protection? The PA+++ rating indicates UVA protection, and SPF 50 covers UVB rays, offering broad-spectrum sun protection. 7. Is Sunguard Sun Protection water-resistant or sweat-proof? While not explicitly labeled as water-resistant, its non-greasy formula is suited for everyday wear. Reapplication is recommended after sweating or swimming. 8. Are there any natural ingredients in Sunguard Sun Protection? Yes, it includes moringa, carrot seed oil, and turmeric, which are known for their soothing and antioxidant-supporting properties. Short Webcontent: Sri Sri Tattva Sunguard SPF 50 PA+++ Sunlight is essential, but unprotected exposure to UV rays? Not so much. Whether walking to work, enjoying a weekend brunch, or simply sipping chai on the balcony, your skin deserves consistent care. Enter Sri Sri Tattva Sunguard SPF 50 PA+++ — a broad-spectrum, lightweight sunscreen crafted with herbal ingredients and antioxidants like moringa, turmeric, and carrot seed oil. If you want a gentle, non-greasy sunscreen free from overpowering fragrances or harsh chemicals, Sunguard may become your new go-to. And the best part? You can easily buy Sunguard sun protection online and enjoy nature-based care at your doorstep. What is Sunguard Lotion? Sri Sri Tattva Sunguard is a herbal sunscreen lotion that blends traditional Ayurvedic knowledge with modern skincare needs. It is designed to protect against UVA and UVB rays and provides broad-spectrum coverage without the usual stickiness or white cast. Key features include: SPF 50 PA+++ for high-level sun protection Infused with moringa, carrot seed oil, and turmeric Suitable for all skin types — from oily to dry to sensitive Dermatologically tested, fragrance-free, paraben-free, and OMC-free Unlike heavy chemical sunscreens, this formula focuses on comfort and simplicity, making everyday sun care feel more like self-care. Types of Sunscreen Products You May Come Across Not all sunscreens are made alike. Virechana Vati is formulated to support relief from constipation and promote digestive cleansing. While it is effective for short-term use, taking it daily for a long period is not generally recommended without supervision. Prolonged use of any laxative, even Ayurvedic, may affect your natural bowel function and overall digestive health.

Experience the nurturing touch of Ayurveda in every drop, ensuring quality and purity for your family’s well-being.

messages.rawText:
[**Raktavardhini Tablet - Hematopoietic, 60 Tabs | 500 mg**](https://www.srisritattva.com/products/shop-raktavardhini-tablet) is ideal for those seeking to naturally support healthy hemoglobin levels and enhance hematopoiesis (blood formation). It is especially beneficial for individuals experiencing anaemia, general weakness (dourbalya), or low vitality due to iron deficiency. The blend of herbs like Mandura Bhasma, Amla, and Ashwagandha nurtures your body holistically.

If you have a specific health condition or are on medication, it’s best to consult an Ayurvedic doctor before starting. Ive shared the product details above. If youd like more personalized guidance, you can also consult our Ayurvedic doctors on WhatsApp. Ill share the number in the next message.
End of stream

messages.rawText:
[**Ayukanti Lehyam - For Children**](https://www.srisritattva.com/products/ayukanti-lehyam-natural-product) is a classical Ayurvedic formulation designed to nurture children’s health holistically. Its key benefits include:

- **Memory enhancement** and support for cognitive abilities, helping improve focus and concentration.
- **Immunity strengthening**, making children more resilient to common illnesses and infections.
- **Improved complexion**, promoting healthy, radiant skin.
- **Overall vitality and longevity**, thanks to rejuvenating Rasayana herbs.

This lehyam is traditionally administered only on Pushya Nakshatra day for optimal results. If you’d like more personalized guidance, you can also consult our Ayurvedic doctors on WhatsApp. I’ll share the number in the next message.
End of stream

[**DEEP-SLP Tablets for Better Sleep**](https://www.srisritattva.com/products/deep-slp-for-better-sleep-100-tabs-1000-mg) have a natural, herbal taste due to their Ayurvedic ingredients like Ashwagandha, Tagara, Mandukaparni, and Shankpushpi. If you are sensitive to taste, you can swallow them quickly with water after food as recommended.

messages.cleanText: How do I use it daily? copy-of-hydrating-hand-wash-250ml-by-shankara

messages.rawText:
To use the [**Kansa Massage & Marma Wand by Shankara**](https://www.srisritattva.com/products/copy-of-hydrating-hand-wash-250ml-by-shankara) daily, follow these steps:

1. Begin with clean, dry skin. You may apply a light facial oil if desired.
2. Use the smaller orb to gently massage Marma points (energy points) on your face.
3. Use the larger orb for broader areas—massage up and down the sides of your neck, along the jawline (TMJ), and lift from chin to ear and lips to cheekbones.
4. Repeat each motion 5–7 times, using gentle pressure.

Daily use helps detoxify, improve circulation, and promote a radiant, balanced complexion. For personalized guidance, you can also consult our Ayurvedic doctors on WhatsApp.

messages.rawText: Why it is used
messages.cleanText: Why it is used

Mahatriphaladya Ghrita is used primarily for **eye care**. Its benefits include improving vision, regulating intraocular pressure (helpful in conditions like glaucoma), reducing the risk of eye infections, and delaying the onset of degenerative eye conditions such as cataracts. It can be used both internally and externally, as advised by a physician, to holistically support and protect eye health.

This combination of **organic jaggery, organic brown sugar, and rock salt** offers several holistic health benefits:

- **Natural & Unrefined:** Minimally processed, preserving nutrients and supporting digestive health.
- **Versatile Use:** Blends easily into beverages, baked dishes, sweets, and savouries, promoting a balanced, natural diet.

Short Webcontent: Sri Sri Tattva Henna Shikakai Shampoo for Silky Smooth Hair Introduction Hair care is an essential part of our daily beauty routine, and choosing the right shampoo can make all the difference in achieving healthy, silky smooth hair. Benefits of Henna Shikakai Shampoo for Silky Smooth Hair Here’s a closer look at the many benefits of using Sri Sri Tattva henna shikakai shampoo. 1. Improves Hair Thickness and Density One of the key benefits of henna shikakai shampoo is its ability to improve the thickness and density of your hair. Henna is known for its natural conditioning properties, which help strengthen the hair shaft and promote thicker hair growth. Shikakai, on the other hand, is rich in vitamins and antioxidants that nourish the scalp and encourage healthy hair growth. Regular use of this shampoo can lead to visibly thicker, denser hair over time. 2. Makes Hair Softer and Silkier If you’re looking to achieve silky smooth hair, Sri Sri Tattva henna shikakai shampoo is the perfect solution. The natural conditioning properties of henna help in making the hair soft and smooth, while shikakai gently cleanses the scalp and hair without stripping away essential moisture. The result is soft, silky hair that feels healthy and looks vibrant. 3.
